steps.title: Recognize the definition
steps.content: The phrase after the blank explains the technical term "cognate replacement" by defining it as the rate at which a word is replaced over time with a noncognate form. The transition must signal restatement or clarification.

steps.title: Choose a clarifying transition
steps.content: A would introduce an example, B would signal a parallel point, and C would add a separate point. The sentence instead needs a transition that marks the following phrase as a definition. The answer is D.
